title: RevenueCat products — Brotein Monthly + Yearly Subscriptions ('Could not check' status)
html:
RevenueCat BroteinOfficialPaywall Products page — Brotein Monthly Subscription (brotein_premium_monthly) + Brotein Yearly Subscription (brotein_yearly_premium), both with 1 Entitlement each, status "Could not check" (App Store Connect side not yet validating). Created 2025-07-31.
